data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Protects sensitive information in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Uses AES-256 encryption and TLS 1.3 for secure communication.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors network traffic for signs of malicious activity.
data.technical_spec: Employs machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent reviews to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes both automated tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: User Access Controls
data.description: Ensures users have access only to necessary information.

data.title: Disaster Recovery Plan
data.description: Maintains business continuity during cyber incidents.
data.technical_spec: Includes regular backups and failover strategies.
